hypothesis: If the MatAgent framework—which combines LLM-driven planning and proposition with diffusion-based structure generation and iComFormer property evaluation and external tools—is used to iteratively discover inorganic compositions, then it will achieve a higher success rate in producing formations within ±0.25 eV/atom of target energies (and yield more valid, unique, and novel compositions) than tool-free LLM variants or MatterGen, because explicit reasoning with knowledge retrieval and feedback enables more directed exploration and accurate structure–property estimation.
